tasks.name: create-hvac-schema
tasks.description: Write schemas/hvac-schema.json — JSON Schema for HVAC normalized output (model, manufacturer, equipment_type, error_codes, troubleshooting_steps, specifications, warranty_years)

tasks.name: create-manifest-schema
tasks.description: Write schemas/manifest-schema.json — JSON Schema for hvac-manifest.json (version, total_chunks, total_models, chunks[].chunk_id through qdrant_point_id)

tasks.name: install-docling
tasks.description: Install docling: pip install docling. Verify with: docling --version

tasks.name: update-gitignore
tasks.description: Add data/hvac/ to .gitignore — raw PDFs and large normalized data should not be committed

tasks.name: write-hvac-normalize
tasks.description: Write scripts/hvac-normalize.py — parse Docling JSON output, extract HVAC fields (model, manufacturer, equipment_type, error_codes, troubleshooting_steps, specifications, warranty_years), output validated against hvac-schema.json

tasks.name: write-hvac-chunk
tasks.description: Write scripts/hvac-chunk.py — recursive text split at 512 tokens with 50 token overlap, preserve page boundaries and section headers, add metadata (model, manufacturer, equipment_type, chunk_index, total_chunks)

tasks.name: write-hvac-manifest
tasks.description: Write scripts/hvac-manifest.py — scan chunks/, produce data/hvac/manifests/hvac-manifest.json with version, total_chunks, total_models, and per-chunk metadata (chunk_id, file_sha256, model, equipment_type, page_start, page_end, chunk_index, text_preview, qdrant_point_id)

tasks.name: write-hvac-validate
tasks.description: Write scripts/hvac-validate.py — validate hvac-manifest.json against manifest-schema.json, check completeness (all normalized files have manifest entries), check chunk quality (no chunk < 50 chars, no chunk > 1024 tokens), exit 0 on clean, exit 1 with report on violations

tasks.name: write-hvac-index
tasks.description: Write scripts/hvac-index.py — index chunks to Open WebUI Knowledge (hvac-manuals collection) and optionally to Qdrant (hvac_chunks collection with nomic-embed-text embeddings via LiteLLM). Use env var HvacIndex__qdrant__enabled=true to toggle Qdrant

tasks.name: write-makefile
tasks.description: Write Makefile with targets: hvac-setup (directories + deps), hvac-normalize (sha256 dedup + docling + normalize), hvac-chunk, hvac-manifest, hvac-validate, hvac-index, hvac-ingest (full pipeline), hvac-clean

tasks.name: write-pipeline-script
tasks.description: Write scripts/hvac-pipeline.sh — end-to-end pipeline runner with timestamped logging to data/hvac/reports/pipeline-<timestamp>.log, sha256 dedup check, error handling, and summary output

tasks.name: wire-hvac-eval
tasks.description: Add make hvac-eval target to Makefile — runs python scripts/hvac-eval.py (from SPEC-HVAC-003) against the latest manifest, outputs to data/hvac/reports/eval-<timestamp>.json
